repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 pursued incomplete-proxy mediation geometry but did not derive this active three-state shared-coarsening rank calculation.

published_prior_art.cite: DukesShpitserTchetgen2023 uses completeness-based proximal mediation; no verified source gives this exact shared-tier rank-two construction.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 already pursued a finite proxy mediation response-function program; the primitive active-class completion repairs its realizability issue.

published_prior_art.cite: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 gives the general sharp discrete-SCM constrained polynomial-program representation.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue proposal states this exact set inclusion, but it is the direct marginalization consequence of the proposed feasible set.

published_prior_art.cite: Sjolander2009 and BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 supply the no-proxy natural-effect bounding baseline.

repo_prior_art.cite: No active entry states this exact reduction, but it is required baseline machinery.

published_prior_art.cite: Sjolander2009 and BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 cover the no-proxy natural-direct-effect response-function setting.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 already sought proxy endpoint exclusion; the three-active-class, latent-realizable shared-coarsening formulation is a material repair rather than a duplicate result.

published_prior_art.cite: No verified paper gives a positive-cell rational endpoint-exclusion certificate for this observed-mediator NDE under failed completeness; closest are BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025, DukesShpitserTchetgen2023, GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023, and ZhangSu2024.

repo_prior_art.cite: scm_prox_recant_pid's earlier nested path-specific angle and the archived proxy-mediation work cover adjacent response-function programs, not this resolved failed-completeness extension.

published_prior_art.cite: BaiWuSunCui2026 and WuBaiCui2026 give proximal point-identification strategies for recanting-witness targets, not a failed-completeness factorization-constrained endpoint-exclusion set.

soundness_flags.label: def:model-class and prop:program-representation
soundness_flags.one_line: The core never defines the compatibility class \(\mathfrak M_{3,\kappa,\eta}^{\mathrm{inc}}(P)=\{P^\star:P^\star|_O=P\}\); thus \(\mathfrak M(P)\) in the proposition is undefined and \(P^\star\)'s required observed marginal, including \(P(A)\), is only implicit.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Fixed active three-state shared-coarsening sensitivity model
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The fixed cardinality, positive latent masses, conditionally independent proxy channels, shared two-tier coarsening, and conditional separation constants are accepted as a conditional sensitivity regime rather than claimed as universal proxy conditions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any sharp-set representation and strict endpoint contraction are claimed only for observed laws compatible with that finite proxy-factorized model, not under unrestricted latent cardinality, completeness, or inference.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define \(\mathfrak M_{3,\kappa,\eta}^{\mathrm{inc}}(P)\) explicitly by the observed marginal constraint \(P^\star|_O=P\), and include the treatment-assignment marginal when deriving the program representation.

Produce a fully specified rational \(P^\dagger\), latent table, proxy kernels, numerical \(\kappa,\eta,\epsilon\), and endpoint-face infeasibility output; then verify all cells are positive and the same strict inequality holds throughout the stated neighborhood.

Anchor the tightening claim to the exact Sjolander2009 and BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 no-proxy endpoint formulas, proving that \(L_0,U_0\) are precisely the comparator endpoints in the binary randomized model.

recommended_next_step: Revise the missing observed-marginal compatibility definition, then pursue the rational robust contraction certificate as the field-level kernel.
